posts.author: KT22 (Kathy Taheri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,

I hope you are doing well.

My name is Kathy Taheri, and I am the Account Manager at Eligeo Business Solutions.

FYI - I am working with one of our accounts, and they are looking for a way to export data from monday.com in MPP(Microsoft Project) format because the projects they are managing for their clients are required to send in MPP format.

Currently, they export data in CSV format and need to take many manual steps to change it to MPP format.

Once you have a chance, would you please let me know if there is any workaround for this process or how we can help them with the MPP format?

Please let me know if you have any questions.

I am looking forward to hearing from you.

Thank you - Kathy

posts.author: Kilian (Hertel)
posts.cookedHtml: You should write a VBA macro that changes the CSV data to Microsoft Project. There is no direct Monday to MS Project Export.
